name: Brain MRI Without Contrast
description: Standard brain MRI report template without contrast for evaluation of intracranial pathology

findings.technique: MRI of the brain was performed including T1-weighted, T2-weighted, FLAIR, diffusion-weighted, and susceptibility-weighted sequences. No contrast was administered.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: T1-Weighted Imaging
sections.content: The T1-weighted images demonstrate [normal gray-white matter differentiation / no mass lesion / no hemorrhage]. No abnormal T1 hyperintensity.

sections.name: T2-Weighted and FLAIR Imaging
sections.content: The T2 and FLAIR sequences demonstrate [no abnormal hyperintensity / no white matter lesions / no cortical signal abnormality]. The ventricular system is normal in size.

sections.name: Diffusion-Weighted Imaging
sections.content: Diffusion-weighted images demonstrate [no restricted diffusion / no acute infarction / no diffusion restriction]. Apparent diffusion coefficient maps are [consistently hyperintense / show corresponding restriction].

sections.name: Susceptibility-Weighted Imaging
sections.content: Susceptibility-weighted images demonstrate [no microhemorrhage / no cavernous malformation / no hemorrhage / no calcification].

sections.name: Ventricles and CSF Spaces
sections.content: The lateral ventricles are [normal in size / not dilated]. The third and fourth ventricles are [patent / normal]. No hydrocephalus. Sulcal pattern is appropriate for age.

sections.name: Midline Structures
sections.content: Midline structures are [midline / no shift]. The corpus callosum is [intact / normal]. No mass effect or herniation.

sections.name: Basal Ganglia and Thalami
sections.content: The basal ganglia and thalami demonstrate [normal T2 signal / no abnormality]. No cystic change or calcification.

sections.name: Cerebellum and Brainstem
sections.content: The cerebellum and brainstem demonstrate [normal architecture / no abnormality]. The cerebellar peduncles are [symmetric / normal].

sections.name: Orbits
sections.content: The orbits and optic nerves are [unremarkable / normal]. The retro-orbital fat is [clear / no abnormality].

sections.name: Temporal Bones and IAC
sections.content: The temporal bones and internal auditory canals are [unremarkable / normal]. The cochlear and vestibular structures are [normal / symmetric].

impression:
1. Normal brain MRI.
2. No mass, infarction, hemorrhage, or demyelinating process identified.
3. No abnormal enhancement would be expected on post-contrast sequences.
author: RadReport Templates
